name: French Vegan Cassoulet
method: Add the beans and water as needed.
Add the salt and pepper in the beans.
Add the salt and cook it until becomes brown.
Season the vegetable pieces with pepper.
Add the onions into the cooking mixture.
Add the garlic, celery stalks, parsley, bay leaves, and add the bean
Cook the beans along with all the ingredients for forty five minutes.
Make sure all the vegetables and beans are mixed well.
Add the chopped parsley on top.
Your dish is ready to be served.
